ussteamco.mod.2 <- lm(
  revenue ~ production * summer +
    coolDD * summer +
    heatDD * summer,
  data = USSteamCoEstim
)
summary(ussteamco.mod.2)
\end{Verbatim}

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\noindent The formula specified in the \ttblue{lm} function, \ttblue{revenue $\sim$ production * summer + coolDD * summer + heatDD * summer} can also be written as \ttblue{revenue $\sim$ (production + coolDD + heatDD) * summer}.

\noindent As a result, this further improved the fit of the model. The residual standard deviation decreased to 1,680,711, and $r^2$ improved to 0.917.
